articles.author: Ayana Archie
articles.title: NASA's Artemis II crew are quite the photographers. See what they've snapped so far - NPR
articles.description: Many of the photos that have come out of the moon mission so far were taken by crew members. NASA says the crew is getting guidance from scientists on what to capture when they get closer to the moon.
articles.content: It has only been a couple days since NASA successfully launched astronauts to the moon for the first time in over half a century. But the Artemis II mission's four-person crew has already delivered s… [+905 chars]

articles.author: Matt Reigle
articles.title: Artemis II Astronaut Christina Koch Proclaims Herself 'Space Plumber' - OutKick
articles.description: Artemis II astronaut Christina Koch fixes a malfunctioning Orion capsule toilet mid-mission, earning “space plumber" status and saving the crew from a worst-case scenario in orbit.
articles.content:
The four astronauts of the Artemis II mission are on their way to the moon's orbit, but not without an early scare: the toilet stopped working.
Fortunately, it got back online before there was an, u… [+1845 chars]

articles.content: The Planetary Society is deeply disappointed by this budget proposal. The White House's budgeting office has put forward the same budget cuts to NASA and NASA Science that were rejected by overwhelmi… [+1444 chars]

articles.author: John Timmer
articles.title: New fossil deposits show complex animal groups predating the Cambrian - Ars Technica
articles.description: Collection of fossils includes Ediacaran, Cambrian species, suggesting a transition.
